item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.itunes:title: QXGEdit [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QXGEdit
(Music Production)
QXGEdit is a Qt GUI for editing MIDI System Exclusive files for XG devices (eg. Yamaha DB50XG).

[read more]

item.title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qsynth [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.description:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qsynth
(Music Production)
Qsynth is a FluidSynth GUI front-end application written in C++ around the Qt framework using Qt Designer. FluidSynth is an excellent command line software synthesizer based on the Soundfont specification.

[read more]

item.title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QjackCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.description:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QjackCtl
(Music Production)
QjackCtl is a simple Qt application to control the JACK sound server daemon, specific for the Linux Audio Desktop infrastructure.
Written in C++ around the Qt framework for X11, most exclusively using Qt Designer.

Provides a simple GUI dialog for setting several JACK daemon parameters, which are properly saved between sessions, and a way control of the status of the audio server daemon. With time, this primordial interface has become richer by including a enhanced patchbay and connection control features.
[read more]

item.title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: hitokiri-2
item.itunes:summary:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.description:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

item.title: Android File Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android File Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Android File Restore Program
(Utilities)
Are you tensed for recovering of erased pictures from android devices? If yes then purchase Android File Restore Program that gives comprehensive way to rescue misplaced video songs from logically crashed android memory card without any alteration. Cost effective android storage media repairing utility gives facility to relocate deleted business folders, mp3/mp4 songs and movies from infected android based hard disk in simplified manner.

[read more]
item.description:
Android File Restore Program
(Utilities)
Are you tensed for recovering of erased pictures from android devices? If yes then purchase Android File Restore Program that gives comprehensive way to rescue misplaced video songs from logically crashed android memory card without any alteration. Cost effective android storage media repairing utility gives facility to relocate deleted business folders, mp3/mp4 songs and movies from infected android based hard disk in simplified manner.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android File Restore Program
(Utilities)
Are you tensed for recovering of erased pictures from android devices? If yes then purchase Android File Restore Program that gives comprehensive way to rescue misplaced video songs from logically crashed android memory card without any alteration. Cost effective android storage media repairing utility gives facility to relocate deleted business folders, mp3/mp4 songs and movies from infected android based hard disk in simplified manner.

[read more]

item.title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.description:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
